intended_use: Assist trained clinicians by flagging retinal fundus images that may warrant review for referable diabetic retinopathy in a retrospective research workflow.
deployment_context: Retrospective evaluation only; not approved for autonomous clinical use.

dataset.name: Synthetic Retinal Screening Validation Set
dataset.description: Synthetic example dataset for demonstrating report generation. Not real patient data.
dataset.inclusion_criteria: Adults with gradable retinal fundus images in the synthetic validation export.
dataset.exclusion_criteria: Ungradable images and records missing synthetic reference labels.
dataset.ground_truth: Synthetic expert-adjudicated image label provided for example purposes.

evaluation.primary_endpoint: Sensitivity for referable diabetic retinopathy at the selected operating threshold

limitations: Synthetic example only; not real-world validation evidence.
No external validation dataset was provided.
No prospective workflow evaluation was performed.
Subgroup sample sizes may be insufficient for definitive fairness conclusions.
known_failure_modes: Low image quality may increase false positives or false negatives.
Performance may vary across camera vendors and acquisition protocols.
